word: H5142 - נְזַק - nᵉzaq - nez-ak' - Have damage

sections.paragraph:
Original: נזק

Transliteration: nezaq

Phonetic: nez-ak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to suffer injury
    1. (Peal) to suffer injury
    2. (Aphel) to injure

Origin: corresponding to the root of H5143

TWOT entry: 2857

Part(s) of speech: Verb
